content:
In the First page, when you open the game, you have to wait for it to load, then click on it to automatically log in, then wait for it to do it, then click again to enter the game.
I can be possible to add a "Remember me and enter" option so that we just have to click 1 time, or even not at all?
It is a small thing, but a constant annoyance, that is been reported from a lot of people
